evaluations.summary: The out-of-scope section embeds an in-scope clarification instead of staying purely exclusionary.
evaluations.why_it_matters: ARB-022 requires out-of-scope entries to contain exclusions only. This phrase mixes an exclusion with a positive in-scope clarification (`role definition`), which makes the boundary less polarity-pure and slightly weakens scope governance clarity.

notes: The contract repeats the same mixed-polarity exclusion found in the markdown scope section.
